features: PACK OF 3: Treat yourself to a luxury pack of 3 hand washes in a sweet Mandarin and Grapefruit scent
FEATURES: Infused with lemon for a refreshing burst of citrus, this hand wash is gentle on the skin
BENEFITS: Keep your hands clean and moisturised with this nourishing formula enriched with sweet mandarin and grapefruit extracts
ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: Vegan-friendly, cruelty-free, and packaged in reusable bottles for a more sustainable choice
LUXURY SCENT: Pamper yourself with the uplifting aroma of sweet mandarin and zesty grapefruit every time you wash your hands
description: Product Description Our most iconic fragrance beautifully crafted in a 500ml hand wash, the perfect kitchen sink accessory. Beautiful inside and out, this hand wash leaves skin gently scented and cleansed with the added benefits of vitamin A, B & C. Our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit fragrance will uplift the senses and bring a luxe dimension to your hand care. Composed with elegant jasmine accents and layered with sparkling citrus top notes, this is an iconic staple to the Signature collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of Jasmine and Orange with sparkling top notes of Sweet Mandarin, Grapefruit and Lemon. Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Benzophenone-4, Peg-150 Distearate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Propylene Glycol, Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Sodium Hydroxide, Panthenol, Retinyl Palmitate, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Hexylene Glycol, Limonene, Linalool, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 15985 (Yellow 6). Directions Lather & Rinse Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets in the eyes rinse immediately with clean warm water. If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use. If irritation persists, consult your doctor. Manufacturer Contact Information Nash Road, Redditch, B98 7AS See more
